speaker: Grubwin
text: No. A potato fell off a shelf. Vermia decided this was a divine response to the hymn we were performing.

speaker: Vermia
text: The shelf was on the NORTH wall. North is Scatha's sacred direction. It was not a coincidence.

speaker: Grubwin
text: The building is slightly tilted. Everything rolls north.

speaker: Vermia
text: TILTED BY THE HAND OF SCATHA.

speaker: Grubwin
text: It was tilted during construction in 1987.

speaker: Vermia
text: Scatha works on a long timeline.
You look at Grubwin. He has the eyes of someone who has lost every single one of these arguments for two years straight and has simply made peace with it.

speaker: Vermia
text: We had a COMMUNION. There is a difference.

speaker: Grubwin
text: We microwaved it and ate it with butter.
You decide you like this club. Before you can say anything else, the door opens.
